texto: People should never surprise you. Humans have basic animal drives that are going to make people predictable. Don’t let them shock you. A person is too easily predicted. Now, Shirley listen closely. There are wolves and there are sheep. Most people are sheep. Even if a person is a sheep, don’t turn your back to them. There is a reason that sheep are so easily controlled...
explicacao: Orientação direta de Raven Huffman sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “People should never surprise you. Humans have basic animal drives that are going to make people p…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, sheep, sherlock-holmes, útil em momentos de sherlock-holmes e society.
